name: syncopated-context
description: Multi-platform development suite for Claude Code. Ruby-focused rubysmithing plugin with 13 specialized agents, plus notebook plugin for AI session recall across platforms (Claude Code, Hermes, Gemini CLI, OpenCode) with GitHub and backup integration.

plugins.name: rubysmithing
plugins.description: Convention-aware Ruby development suite with 13 job-function agents: agentic-operations-lead, agentic-software-engineer, context-engineer, cognitive-architect, ux-engineer, platform-engineer, maintenance-architect, ruby-diagnostics-engineer, senior-qa-engineer, director-of-ai-risk, compliance-guardrail-agent, developer-experience-engineer, senior-backend-architect. Includes 6 workflow commands (diagnose, audit, translate, document, flow, vibe) using SDD-style task pipelines. Lite Mode for stdlib scripts, Standard Mode with async, circuit_breaker, Zeitwerk compliance for production code.
